/cwe/weakness/820.Name: Missing Synchronization
/cwe/weakness/820.Description: The product utilizes a shared resource in a concurrent manner but does not attempt to synchronize access to the resource.
/cwe/weakness/820.ExtendedDescription: If access to a shared resource is not synchronized, then the resource may not be in a state that is expected by the product. This might lead to unexpected or insecure behaviors, especially if an attacker can influence the shared resource.

Entries.IntroText: The following code intends to fork a process, then have both the parent and child processes print a single line.

Entries.BodyText: One might expect the code to print out something like:
